arguments.old_string:
#ifdef USE_HTTP3
  /* RFC 9218 Extensible Priorities for HTTP/3 */
  unsigned char urgency;   /* 0-7, where 0 is most urgent */
  BIT(incremental);        /* incremental flag for priority frame */
#endif
arguments.new_string:
#ifdef USE_HTTP3
  /* RFC 9218 Extensible Priorities for HTTP/3 */
  unsigned char urgency;   /* 0-7, where 0 is most urgent */
  BIT(incremental);        /* incremental flag for priority frame */
  BIT(h3_set);             /* whether h3 priority was explicitly set */
#endif
